items.title: Do third-place match winners only get bronze medals? Here's everything at stake in France vs England
items.summary: The third-place playoff has featured at every FIFA World Cup except in 1930 and 1950, when the tournament used different competition formats.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Luis de la Fuente reveals Spain will not man-mark Messi in World Cup final
items.summary: Coach tells of first encounter when Messi was 16 ‘I took man-marker off and Messi scored four’ Luis de la Fuente says he will not man-mark Lionel Messi in the World Cup final, e...
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Weatherley 88* sets standard as Hampshire sweep past Notts
items.summary: Partnership of 126 with captain Vince helps put three-time champions out of reach
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
